stories.title: Takeaways: Wemby, Spurs close out Thunder
stories.summary: Here's everything we learned from the Spurs-Thunder series.

stories.title: WCF win gets Wemby closer to 'childhood dream'
stories.summary: On Saturday night at Paycom Center, the San Antonio Spurs eliminated the NBA's defending champions, the Oklahoma City Thunder, in Game 7 of the Western Conference finals, a 111-103 victory fueled by center Victor Wembanyama's 22 points and seven rebounds.

stories.title: KO'd by Spurs, OKC says no excuses, 'get better'
stories.summary: The Thunder tipped their cap to the Spurs after a disappointing Game 7 loss on Saturday night and set out to "try to get over the hump" against a team that looms as a long-term roadblock.

stories.title: Lemieux's brain being donated for CTE research
stories.summary: Claude Lemieux's brain is being donated to the Boston University CTE Center to research the long-term effects of repetitive brain injuries, his family said Saturday.

stories.title: Fever's Clark goes cold, held to 6 points in loss
stories.summary: Fever star Caitlin Clark struggled with her shot and was held to six points in a 100-84 loss to the Fire on Saturday night.
